title: Entry-Level Business Development Manager at RMZ Corp

jsonLd.title: Entry-Level Business Development Manager at RMZ Corp
jsonLd.description:
RMZ Corp has an exciting opening for a Business Development Manager at our Allahabad office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About RMZ Corp:
RMZ Corp is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Conduct market research and provide competitive analysis
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Client Relationship Management
• Proficiency in GIS Tools
• Proficiency in Property Management
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in Contract Management
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Annual performance appraisal
• Referral bonus program
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Allahabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with RMZ Corp!
